name: examportal
description: AI-powered exam quiz portal — root workspace

scripts.setup:
cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && echo '
✅ Setup complete! Now:
   1. cd backend && cp .env.example .env
   2. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to backend/.env
   3. npm run dev'
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
